pi_items.source: Task description requires saving the product in BEAM-DIMAP format to this exact path.
Task description instructs exporting the product as a GeoTIFF to this exact path.

Task description explicitly requires creating bands with exact casing: 'NDVI_float', 'NDVI_uint8', 'NDVI_recon', and 'Quantization_Error'. export_result.sh extracts band names exactly as they are written in the .dim file.
setup_task.sh downloads the Landsat data file directly from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat multi-spectral GeoTIFF data downloaded from opengeos. The expected output BEAM-DIMAP file must be saved to /home/ga/snap_exports/quantization_study.dim, and the GeoTIFF export to /home/ga/snap_exports/quantization_error.tif. The required bands to be created with Band Maths are strictly named 'NDVI_float', 'NDVI_uint8', 'NDVI_recon', and 'Quantization_Error', contradicting the metadata's lowercase claim.
